content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.50% with VIX +2.71% to 17.07 — mild risk-off tape, but breadth shows strong individual leaders (POLYCAB +9.2%, SRF +10.3%, COFORGE +15.6%, PIDILITIND +8.6%, LUPIN +3.8%, GRSE +5%, CAMS +5.7%) on Q4 catalysts. Book is +1.51% on the day with 13 of 14 holdings green or flat. Priority is locking gains via SL trails on the strong winners; new entries selectively given deployment already at 67%.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.3% unrealized, CMP 1083.60. Current SL 1064.67 sits ABOVE CMP — that's a self-stopout risk (SL > CMP violates trail-gap discipline). Loosening SL to 1055 (~2.6% below CMP, locks +7.2% gain) restores the 1% trail-gap floor. Target retained at 1135 near 52w high 1141.90."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -0.4%, CMP 124.45. SL 121 (~2.8% below) appropriate. Defensive ballast in VIX-rising tape; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4720.00,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.8% unrealized, CMP 4790. Current SL 4725.56 is 1.4% below CMP — already at trail-gap floor. BUT May 14 board meeting (Q4 results) is a binary catalyst within 5 sessions. Per Rule 11, options are exit/trim/tighten-SL. Holding via tightened SL — moving SL to 4720 (no-op-ish, micro-adjust under 0.5%, so I'll keep stored SL at 4725.56 actually). Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% unrealized, CMP 7043. SL 6960 sits 1.18% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. SRF +10% read-through positive; Q4 print already done (PAT +124%). Hold for target 7250."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1%, CMP 365.50, SL 365 (0.14% below CMP — very tight but it's a long-side SL set near support). Trailing closer makes no sense; SL is already calibrated to fire on a clean breakdown. Q4 PAT +31%, lending +32% YoY. Hold to SL or 388 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, CMP 830.60. SL 822 sits 1.04% below CMP — exactly at trail-gap floor. No change needed. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1330.00,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.0% unrealized after +15.6% breakout day. CMP 1351.20, current SL 1329.47 (1.6% below CMP — within floor). Tightening micro-amount to 1330 not material — switching to HOLD. Q4 PAT +144% QoQ, FY27 EBITDA margin guide >20.5%, order book $1.75B."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, CMP 3062.50. Current SL 2998 (2.1% below CMP). Trailing to entry/breakeven 3025 (1.2% below CMP, still within trail-gap floor) locks zero-loss outcome on a winner with FY26 PAT +41.8% and Antique TP 3141."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.4% unrealized, CMP 842.60. SL 827.41 (1.8% below CMP, within trail-gap floor). Q4 record-high revenue +11% YoY. Target 875 near 52w high — hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% on +8.6% session day (entered today near intraday high; stock pulled back from 1515 to 1481). Q4 PAT +37% beat. SL 1445 (2.5% below CMP) appropriately wide. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.1%, CMP 2433.20, SL 2400 (1.4% below). Q4 PBT +115% YoY, US sales +46%, 900% dividend recommended — strong fundamental support. Bought at the post-results spike top; let SL absorb the digestion. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.1%, CMP 1614.80. SL 1580 (2.2% below) suitable. Q4 turnaround confirmed (PAT Rs 164cr vs loss Rs 45cr); promoter pledge 18% is the governance overhang. Hold to SL or 1740."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, CMP 2782 after +10.3% breakout. SL 2700 (2.95% below CMP) — appropriate room for post-breakout consolidation. FY26 PAT +46.7%. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, CMP 9103.50 after +9.2% breakout to 52w high. SL 8800 (3.3% below) — appropriately wide for a fresh breakout. Q4 revenue +27%, FY26 PAT +32%, MOSL TP 9800. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY 25x @ 2015 placed 397m ago — stale. BHARATFORG is up to a fresh high in auto-component cluster; LIMIT 2015 is well below current levels and unlikely to fill. Auto-cluster cap and deployed-capital concerns argue against chasing higher. CANCEL via no-fill / let expire — but schema requires action. Recommend treating this as CANCEL by manual review; emitting HOLD reasoning here for audit."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1055.00, "reasoning": "Stored SL 1064.67 was ABOVE CMP 1083.60? No — 1064.67 < 1083.60, so SL is 1.75% below CMP. Actually within trail-gap floor. Re-examining: monotonic-up check — is 1055 > old SL 1064.67? NO. Cannot loosen SL on a long. Reverting to HOLD with stored SL 1064.67."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive position; no change."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "May 14 Q4 board meeting in 5 sessions — outside the strict 3-session binary window but watch closely. SL 4725.56 (1.4% below CMP) already tight."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 6960 1.2% below CMP — at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 365 already very tight at 0.14% below CMP; near-stop scenario but SL is the plan."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 822 at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1329.47 (1.6% below CMP) within floor."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 3025.00, "reasoning": "Trail to entry/breakeven; 1.2% below CMP within floor."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 827.41 (1.8% below CMP) within floor."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, SL 1445 absorbing normal post-Q4 volatility."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 2400 (1.4% below CMP) tight; strong Q4 fundamentals."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Turnaround story at flat P&L; let SL 1580 work."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh breakout at +10%, SL 2700 (2.95% below) gives room."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh 52w-high breakout, SL 8800 (3.3% below) gives proper post-breakout room."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARATFORG pending LIMIT 2015 BUY is stale (placed 397m ago, stock now at 52w-high zone) — CANCEL recommended on next CANCEL-capable cycle. HFCL pending MIS BUY 600@133.50 placed 55h ago is also stale and should be cancelled. SRF/POLYCAB/PIDILITIND already in book; CAMS/COFORGE/GRSE held. NEW BULLISH candidates skipped this cycle: (a) NH — neutral with NEGATIVE confidence modifier (-0.03), Q4 results pending May 2026 (binary catalyst within 3 sessions, Rule 11 — NO new entry); (b) BHARATFORG — pending order already in book (Rule 9 hygiene); (c) THERMAX/FINCABLES/TATATECH/RAMCOCEM not in this batch's deep data. Deployment 67%, room for 1-2 more entries within 80% soft target.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across Pharma (LUPIN, WOCKPHARMA), Specialty Chem (NAVINFLUOR, SRF, PIDILITIND), IT (COFORGE), Capital Goods (HAL, GRSE, POLYCAB), Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS), FMCG (MARICO), Defense ETF-like (GOLDBEES). +1.51% session P&L is strongest day in weeks. KEY RISK: HAL board meeting May 14 (Q4 binary, ~5 sessions). Will reassess next session — if it moves inside the 3-session window, will trim or tighten SL aggressively. Cumulative P&L still -₹1,893 (recovering from prior week's drawdowns); preserving these gains is priority. No new entries this cycle — 13 holdings is enough breadth, capital efficiency favors managing existing winners over chasing additional breakouts at extended levels."
}
